datasets.name: de775910
queryLines:
select
  *
from
  databricksproject_ws.`03_gold`.d_sales_summary
WHERE
  order_date between :DATE_RANGE.min AND :DATE_RANGE.max;

datasets.name: newly_joined_customers
queryLines:
select
  *
from
  databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.dim_customers
where
  join_date between :DATE_RANGE.min and :DATE_RANGE.max;

datasets.name: f21af48f
datasets.displayName: Top Ten Most Popular Menu Selections Summary
queryLines:
with top10 as (
select item_id, sum(quantity) as total_quantity from databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.fact_order_items
where order_timestamp between :DATE_RANGE.min and :DATE_RANGE.max
group by item_id
sort by sum(quantity) desc
limit 10
)

select menu_items.name, top10.total_quantity from top10
left join databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.dim_menu_items menu_items
on top10.item_id==menu_items.item_id;

datasets.name: f2f6f48f
queryLines:
SELECT
  mi.category AS food_category,
  SUM(foi.subtotal) AS revenue
FROM databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.fact_order_items foi
INNER JOIN databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.dim_menu_items mi
  ON foi.item_id = mi.item_id
 AND foi.restaurant_id = mi.restaurant_id
WHERE foi.order_timestamp BETWEEN :DATE_RANGE.min AND :DATE_RANGE.max
GROUP BY mi.category
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

datasets.name: 460a360b
queryLines:
select 
  date(reviews.review_timestamp) as review_date,
  restaurants.name as restaurant_name,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sentiment='positive' then order_id else null end) positive_review_ct,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sentiment='negative' then order_id else null end) negative_review_ct,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN sentiment='neutral' then order_id else null end) neutral_review_ct
from databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.fact_reviews reviews
inner join databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants restaurants
on reviews.restaurant_id = restaurants.restaurant_id
GROUP BY review_date, restaurant_name
ORDER BY review_date, restaurant_name;

datasets.name: eee99837
queryLines:
select restaurant_name,
       '5 star' as rating_label, rating_5_count as rating_count
from databricksproject_ws.`03_gold`.d_restaurant_reviews
union all
select restaurant_name,
       '4 star' as rating_label, rating_4_count as rating_count
from databricksproject_ws.`03_gold`.d_restaurant_reviews
union all
select restaurant_name,
       '3 star' as rating_label, rating_3_count as rating_count
from databricksproject_ws.`03_gold`.d_restaurant_reviews
union all
select restaurant_name,
       '2 star' as rating_label, rating_2_count as rating_count
from databricksproject_ws.`03_gold`.d_restaurant_reviews
union all
select restaurant_name,
       '1 star' as rating_label, rating_1_count as rating_count
from databricksproject_ws.`03_gold`.d_restaurant_reviews

datasets.name: 22ad71a2
queryLines:
select 
  restaurant.name as restaurant,
  count(distinct case when review.issue_delivery = true then review.order_id else null end) as issue_delivery_ct,
  count(distinct case when review.issue_food_quality = true then review.order_id else null end) as issue_food_quality_ct,
  count(distinct case when review.issue_pricing = true then review.order_id else null end) as issue_pricing_ct,
  count(distinct case when review.issue_portion_size = true then review.order_id else null end) as issue_portion_size_ct
from databricksproject_ws.02_silver.fact_reviews review
join databricksproject_ws.02_silver.dim_restaurants restaurant
  on review.restaurant_id = restaurant.restaurant_id
where restaurant.__END_AT is null
group by restaurant.name;

datasets.name: b6e153b6
queryLines:
-- positive reviews latest
SELECT
  reviews.review_text AS review,
  rest.name AS restaurant,
  reviews.review_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.fact_reviews reviews
JOIN databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants rest
  ON reviews.restaurant_id = rest.restaurant_id
WHERE reviews.sentiment = 'positive'
  AND reviews.review_text IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY reviews.review_timestamp DESC;

datasets.name: 52e0410e
queryLines:
-- positive reviews latest
SELECT
  reviews.review_text AS review,
  rest.name AS restaurant,
  reviews.review_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.fact_reviews reviews
JOIN databricksproject_ws.`02_silver`.dim_restaurants rest
  ON reviews.restaurant_id = rest.restaurant_id
WHERE reviews.sentiment = 'negative'
  AND reviews.review_text IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY reviews.review_timestamp DESC;
